subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! The eloquent and fluent verses, which in sweetness were as honey, were perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم اشعار فصیح و بلیغی که در حلاوت چون انگبین بود ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
